overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character traversing a rain-soaked dystopian urban environment. The character runs from an open street into a neon-lit commercial building, then walks along elevated walkways past a street musician, ending at a foggy highway overlook. Heavy rain, fog, and neon signage create a moody cyberpunk atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy, rain-soaked street in a futuristic city. The camera follows a character in a red shirt running across wet asphalt toward a commercial building. A large green holographic billboard glows in the distance through the heavy rain, while palm trees and modern street lamps line the approach.

events.description: character enters building from rainy street into covered commercial space

agents.ego_description: walking through entrance into a dimly lit interior space with glowing vending machines and neon signs

glowing red and yellow neon signage advertising products
large vertical posters on walls including one with 'HEYOW' text
flag hanging on back wall near ceiling
thick structural support columns throughout interior

segments.scene_description: The character enters a commercial building from the rain, transitioning to a sheltered interior space with concrete floors and pillars. Neon-lit vending machines line the walls, and a few NPCs stand around the area. The lighting shifts to artificial neon mixed with dim ambient light.

begins descending concrete stairs to lower elevation

segments.scene_description: The character exits the building to a covered walkway where a street vendor stands under a red umbrella. The camera follows as the character approaches and begins descending a wide concrete staircase with metal railings, moving toward a lower level of the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with industrial buildings and highway view

events.description: reaches bottom of stairs and enters lower elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated concrete walkway with metal railings, observing industrial buildings and distant highway

segments.scene_description: Having descended the stairs, the character walks along a lower elevated walkway bordered by metal railings. Industrial buildings with satellite dishes line the left side, while a highway overpass is visible through the fog ahead. The ground shows drainage grates and scattered debris.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered section of the walkway, passing a street musician playing guitar against a graffiti-covered wall. A bright red and green 'BURRITO XXL' vending machine stands out against the dark concrete surroundings. The area is littered with cardboard and debris.

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive concrete overpass structure, the environment growing darker and more enclosed. Trash and debris scatter the ground. The character approaches an overlook where two people stand at a railing, looking down at a foggy highway below. Palm trees and distant buildings are barely visible through the heavy fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-drenched open street into the sheltered, neon-lit depths of a dystopian urban complex. It begins with a character in a red shirt running across wet asphalt toward a commercial building, guided by a glowing green holographic billboard through heavy rain and fog. As the character enters the building, the environment shifts from the natural elements to a dim interior of concrete pillars and neon vending machines, before transitioning back outside to a covered walkway where the camera descends a wide concrete staircase. The scene then expands along a lower elevated walkway bordered by industrial buildings and satellite dishes, passing a street musician and a bright burrito vending machine against graffiti-covered walls. Finally, the camera moves beneath a massive, dark concrete overpass and through scattered debris toward an overlook where figures stand gazing at a foggy highway below.
